title: Heroes of the Game
synonyms: メジャーリーグアニメ
synopsis: MLB has teamed up with a crew of creators from the world of anime, tapping animators from One Piece and Full Metal Alchemist to release Heroes of the Game! The power, precision, and skill needed for MLB players to reach the top of their game is almost superhuman. Now, that intensity is being showcased through the world of anime—connecting fans from America, Japan, the UK, and beyond. The campaign features Shohei Ohtani as the Master of Both Sides of the Game, Paul Skenes as the pitcher with ferocious power to unleash, Aaron Judge as the Herculean hitter on a mission to become one of the all-time greats, and Juan Soto as the man who sees all and can change the game with just one swing. (Source: YouTube description)

title: Genshin Impact: The Lights of Lantern Rite
titleEnglish: Genshin Impact: The Lights of Lantern Rite
synonyms: 원신 저 멀리 어둠 속의 등불
synopsis: On this annual festival, people return from far and wide to gather in blissful reunion. They share stories of past joys and sorrows, and wish for all the best in the year to come. Though fireworks may fade, laughter leaves behind a lingering warmth, one that nestles deep and sweet within the heart. (Source: YouTube description)

title: The Grand Restaurant
synonyms: The Kitchen is a Battlefield! "The Grand Restaurant"
厨房即战场！「黄金大饭店」
厨房、すなわち戦場！「黄金食堂」
synopsis: Raise your glasses and toast to a feast like no other, where the western winds fade into golden revelry. On April 1st, Year 4██1 of the Light Calendar, The Grand Chrysos eagerly awaits your arrival! "Honestly, I think "the Grand Restaurant" has a better ring to it." "Uh... Your taste in names is certainly... one of a kind." Note: Honkai Star Rail april fools special animated short for The Grand Restaurant

title: Digimon Adventure-BEYOND-
titleNative: デジモンアドベンチャー-BEYOND-
synonyms: デジモンアドベンチャー25周年記念PV
synopsis: A PV to commemorate the 25th anniversary of Digimon Adventure. The short features all new footage depicting previously unseen scenes leading up to the final episode of the second season of Digimon, an episode which takes place 25 years into the future. (Source: Crunchyroll News)

tags.name: Proxy Battle
tags.description: A proxy battle is a battle where humans use creatures/robots to do the fighting for them, either by commanding those creatures/robots or by simply evolving them/changing them into battle mode.

title: THE CRYSTALLIZATION
synopsis: A mouse and a bear live deep in a secluded forest. One morning, when the mouse steps outside, he finds that the forest has begun to crystallize...

synopsis: On a full moon day, Pikachu meets many Pokemon. The Pokemon who gather and dance also make an appearance! (Source: YouTube description) Note: Originally uploaded to Pokemon's official bilibili channel on Sept 14, 2024, then later uploaded to their official Japanese channel on Sept. 17, 2024.

title: Genshin Impact: Wish in a Bottle
titleEnglish: Genshin Impact: Wish in a Bottle
synopsis: Citlali has always lived in solitude, And the children of the Masters of the Night-Wind usually only learn about the legendary Granny Itztli through frightening tales told by the adults. Thus, they view her dwelling as a dangerous place, one that children are warned to stay away from. However, some brave children still gather the courage To seek out wishes that only the great shaman Citlali can fulfill... (Source: YouTube description)

title: Genshin Impact: Memories of This Life
titleEnglish: Genshin Impact: Memories of This Life
synopsis: An individual's memories cannot bear the ceaseless suffering and lingering wishes of souls long departed over centuries. But the weight of a soul can.
